title: From Celebrities to Anyone: Characterizing AI Nudification Content, Technology, and Community Dynamics on 4chan
abstract: arXiv:2606.27234v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: AI nudification uses generative models to create synthetic non-consensual sexually explicit imagery (SNEACI) of real individuals. Prior work has examined dedicated nudification platforms and model repositories, finding that most targets are female celebrities. However, the anonymous content community, where SNEACI is actively requested, generated, and exchanged, remains unexplored. In this work, we present a large-scale study of AI nudification in the wild, identifying 24,105 SNEACI items. We find a significant shift in target demographics: non-celebrity individuals now account for 55.8\% of targets, compared to only 4.7\% in prior studies, indicating that AI nudification has expanded from targeting public figures to increasingly harming individuals within users' own social circles. Meanwhile, open-source models dominate production, with Stable Diffusion family generating 42.7\% of images and Wan generating 66.5\% of videos, all driven

Title: From Celebrities to Anyone: Characterizing AI Nudification Content, Technology, and Community Dynamics on 4chan

translated_title: 从名人到普通人：4chan上AI裸体化内容、技术及社区动态的特征分析
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.27234v1 公告类型：交叉摘要：AI裸体化技术利用生成模型为真实个体创建非自愿的合成色情图片（SNEACI）。先前的研究聚焦于专门的裸体化平台和模型仓库，发现大多数目标为女性名人。然而，主动请求、生成和交换SNEACI的匿名内容社区尚未被探索。在本研究中，我们对现实世界中的AI裸体化现象进行了大规模研究，识别出24,105件SNEACI物品。我们发现目标人群发生了显著变化：非名人个体现在占目标的55.8%，而先前研究中仅为4.7%，这表明AI裸体化已从针对公众人物扩展到越来越多地伤害用户自身社交圈内的个体。同时，开源模型主导了生成过程，Stable Diffusion系列生成了42.7%的图像，Wan生成了66.5%的视频，所有生成均由社区驱动。
tldr: 该研究发现，AI裸体化内容的目标已从名人转向普通人（占55.8%），且开源模型（如Stable Diffusion）主导了此类内容的生成。
en_tdlr: This study reveals that AI nudification targets have shifted from celebrities to non-celebrity individuals (55.8%), with open-source models like Stable Diffusion dominating the production of such content.
